title: lolium multiflorum var. lepturoides
intro: Lolium multiflorum var. lepturoides, also known as Italian ryegrass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Italian ryegrass include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
